_meta.verified_scope: ONLY owner_verified_fields are penalized in accuracy; all else = candidate_not_verified
_meta.language_intent: value = AS WRITTEN ON DOCUMENT (Ukrainian here); canonical goes in *_latin/*_english; see docs/reports/GT_LANGUAGE_INTENT.md
_meta.fill_instructions: Type exactly as written. Unreadable -> null + note. Set ground_truth_status=VERIFIED_BY_OWNER. Do NOT commit filled file.
